id: create-or-update-translations

</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/translations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Sets translations for existing key or creates new key and sets the translations to it.
